---
id: upload-a-file-to-the-file-store
title: "Upload a file to the file store"
description: "Multipart upload. The stored file can be referenced by its path in POST /run — it is bind-mounted read-only at /{path} inside the container (e.g. uploading workspace/script.py makes it available at /workspace/script.py)."
sidebar_label: "Upload a file to the file store"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/boxer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Upload a file to the file store"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/files"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Multipart upload. The stored file can be referenced by its path in POST /run — it is bind-mounted read-only at /\{path\} inside the container (e.g. uploading workspace/script.py makes it available at /workspace/script.py).

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./upload-a-file-to-the-file-store.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  {...require("./upload-a-file-to-the-file-store.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
